name: update_page
description: Update the properties of an existing Notion page. You can change any property value such as title, status, dates, tags, or custom fields. You can also archive or unarchive a page. Note: this updates properties only; to update page content blocks, use the blocks API.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: The UUID of the page to update. This is a path parameter.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: An object containing the property values to update. Keys are property names, values follow the Notion property value schema.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Set to true to archive the page, or false to unarchive it.

parameters.name: icon
parameters.description: Update the page icon. Can be an emoji or external URL.
